name: Beyond Siberia: Riding the Road of Bones
original_name: Beyond Siberia: Riding the Road of Bones
overview: The 30,000 km motorbike ride from London to Magadan, on the edge of Russia, has been described as one of the most challenging rides in the world. For four long months a group of adventure riders from around the world travelled across a quarter of the Earth’s surface, pushing themselves and their bikes to the limit.

trailers.title: Beyond Siberia - Road of Bones Motorcycle Expedition Teaser
